Feels great to get back in the gym & working out. I was really nervous at first, scared of doing too much or the wrong thing. Feeling super blessed to be 5 months pregnant, at the same time what if I do something that risks it? It’s been 2 hard years of IVF to get here. I feel like a bull in a china shop.  I want to make pregnancy a place where I love my body and what it can do, in all aspects. The goal is to bring a healthy baby into this world, but staying active is an important part of that.

It’s taken a lot to get to this moment. Years of infertility trying naturally with no success.  Once i was diagnosed with stage 4 endometriosis back in 2020 we had a reason for the hardship, but learned that IVF was my best chance to have a baby.  We’ve been at it for the past 2 years now, doing egg retrivals, creating embryos and going through 3 failed frozen embryo transfers.  4th times the charm 🍀🌈 😍 worth every step to get here.  #ivfjourney #pregnant #endometriosis #infertility #motherhood

Bobsled has taught me a lot and armed me with the tools to face this IVF journey. Throughout this racing season I have kept up with my IVF plan, which included 2 Lupron Depot shots. They are required to help stop my endometriosis symptoms and prepare my body for the implantation / transfer stage. Both shots were during the season, one of which happened to fall the day before my World Championship race.  It’s not an ideal situation as an athlete, due to side effects and the unknown hormone changes, but it’s worth it to me. (Hot flashes are a real and crazy thing. 🔥🥵) We decided to do it during the season so we do not have to wait once we get home to begin the implantation stage / Embryo transfer .  I will stop at nothing to make my dream of becoming a mother come true. Having Travis by my side this season has made everything possible, family and sport wise. We are a team together in sport and in life.  . #ivf #ivfjourney #baby #motherhood #injections #hotflashes #athlete #olympics #bobsled #ivfwarrior

This is one of the few ways we get to actually practice our sport in the summer. Pushing on ice can only be done in Lake Placid at the icehouse. There’s only 1 in all of 🇺🇸, And only 2 in all of North America. Allows us to get reps & reps focusing on our start technique.  A fast start can make or break a race result. It’s 1/3 of what it takes to win consistently.  . #bobsled #push #athlete #trainingday #icehouse #bobsleigh #teamwork

Bobsled 101: 🇺🇸 Sleds getting packed up and shipped out for our first race of the season, in Whistler 🇨🇦.  We load our own equipment into sea crates to travel from track to track. They get flown inside planes or driven on trucks depending on the distance it has to travel around the 🌎. Sleds weigh 375lbs (170kg).  Tool boxes, runners, polishing equipment, weights, bags (gear), etc… . . @teamusa @usabobsledskeleton @ibsfsliding #athlete #bobsled

Worth the wait 💍🥇🇺🇸 today my USA Olympic ring came in.  I’ve gotten 5 of these now, but this is my first one with #teamusa  All 🇺🇸 Olympians can receive a ring post games that says USA Olympic team around the top. (only the gold medalist get a different inscription😉.) . I’m so proud and honored to be receiving this ring today. The ring signifies a team unity that I share with all other 🇺🇸 Olympic members. A celebration of what it means to achieve the Olympian title and represent your country at the highest level of sport.  Not every country gives out Olympic Rings, so this makes it one of a kind.  As the only female in Olympic history to win Gold for 2 separate countries, this specific ring has the most sentimental value to me. It’s a reminder that I risked everything, started over mid career, and was able to rise back up to the top. I couldn’t have done it alone, my team made it possible. Wearing this ring will remind me of the struggle, hard work, commitment, overcoming obstacles and teamwork that went into making the 2022 Olympics.  . #athlete #olympics #gold #bobsleigh @teamusa @usabobsledskeleton @olympics #frostyourself #icing #diamondrings #goldrings #reward

We did it, bought our first house together!  There’s no place like home. 🏡  Owning a home in California 🇺🇸 these days was something I didn’t know could ever happen. With rising prices and taxes, some days it seemed light years away from possible.  Today I am proud to say, we found a way.  Saving money and finding a rare gem we are now officially homeowners.  We have spent weeks of painting and making it feel like our own. A place we can grow into.  Home sweet home ❤️ #homeowner #house #family

Some days motivation is overflowing, others days it’s not so easy. Even the best of us as athletes have low motivation days, but don’t let it stop you. The trick is to find ways to keep consistent and stay the course.  Goals and dreams aren’t meant to be easy to achieve.  Some days music helps me, finding the right song. Other days I remind myself of why I am doing this. A change in environment, having a workout buddy or lighten the load also works……but I never give up or quit. Nobody is coming to do it for me.  Reminder; Your dreams only work if you do. . #athletes  #hacks  #tricksandtips  #workoutmotivation  #consistency  #stepbystep  #daybyday  #strong  #mentalstrength  #putinthework  #worthit  #olympicspirit  #mindset  #yellowstone  #country #duttonranchfreestyle
